word: G2635 - καταλαλέω - katalaléō - kat-al-al-eh'-o - Speak against

sections.paragraph:
- Original: καταλαλέω

- Transliteration: Katalaleo

- Phonetic: kat-al-al-eh'-o

- Definition:

1. to speak against one, to criminate, traduce

- Origin: from G2637

- TDNT entry: 04:03,5

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G2637; to be a traducer that is to slander: - speak against (evil of).
